home.headline: Convert Any Document
home.subheadline: Transform PDFs, Word documents, presentations, images, and more into structured formats ready for AI processing.

batch.toggleTitle: Toggle batch mode for multiple file uploads

docsPanel.title: Documentation
docsPanel.subtitle: Duckling Reference
docsPanel.notBuiltBody: The documentation site needs to be built before it can be viewed.

enable.label: Enable OCR
enable.description: Extract text from scanned documents and images

status.cannotInstallInUi: {{name}} cannot be installed from this UI. Please install it manually:

forceFullPage.label: Force Full Page OCR
forceFullPage.description: OCR the entire page instead of just detected text regions

enable.label: Enable Table Extraction
enable.description: Detect and extract tables from documents

structure.label: Structure Extraction
structure.description: Preserve table structure and cell relationships

cellMatching.label: Cell Matching
cellMatching.description: Match cell content to table structure

generatePictures.label: Generate Picture Images
generatePictures.description: Extract embedded pictures as separate files

scale.label: Image Scale
scale.description: Scale factor for extracted images (1.0 = original)

enable.label: Enable Chunking
enable.description: Split documents into chunks for RAG applications

mergePeers.label: Merge Peers
mergePeers.description: Combine undersized chunks with similar metadata

code.label: Code Enrichment
code.description: Enhance code blocks with language detection

pictureClassification.label: Picture Classification
pictureClassification.description: Classify images by type (figure, chart, photo, etc.)

enrichment.warning: ⚠️ Enrichment features may require additional model downloads and significantly increase processing time.

preDownload.title: Pre-Download Models
preDownload.description: Download models ahead of time to avoid delays during document processing.

enrichment.upgradeTip: 💡 Tip: Upgrade Docling to enable enrichment features:

historyPanel.title: History
historyPanel.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all history?

statsPanel.title: Statistics
statsPanel.tooltipSuccessRate: Percentage of conversions that completed successfully.
statsPanel.tooltipAvgProcessingTime: Average time to convert a document from start to finish.
statsPanel.tooltipAvgPagesPerSec: Average number of document pages processed per second across all conversions.
statsPanel.tooltipAvgPagesPerSecPerCpu: Pages per second divided by CPU count. Useful for comparing efficiency across different machines.
statsPanel.tooltipQueueDepth: Number of conversions currently waiting in the queue to be processed.
statsPanel.tooltipHardwareType: Detected acceleration: CPU, CUDA (NVIDIA GPU), or MPS (Apple Silicon).
statsPanel.tooltipCpuCount: Number of logical CPU cores available on this system.
statsPanel.tooltipCurrentCpuUsage: Current CPU usage of the Duckling backend process (runs Docling during conversions).
statsPanel.tooltipGpuInfo: GPU model and memory available for acceleration.
statsPanel.tooltipConversionTimeDistribution: Percentiles show how conversion times are distributed. p50 = median, p95/p99 = slower cases.
statsPanel.tooltipConversionTimeP50: Median conversion time. Half of conversions finished in this time or less.
statsPanel.tooltipConversionTimeP95: 95th percentile. 95% of conversions finished in this time or less.
statsPanel.tooltipConversionTimeP99: 99th percentile. 99% of conversions finished in this time or less.
statsPanel.tooltipPagesPerSecOverTime: Processing speed for each conversion over time. Higher is faster.
statsPanel.tooltipPerformanceByHardware: Metrics broken down by the hardware used (CPU, CUDA, MPS). Compare performance across devices.
statsPanel.tooltipPerformanceByOcrBackend: Metrics broken down by OCR engine (EasyOCR, Tesseract, etc.). Compare speed and reliability.
statsPanel.tooltipPerformanceByImageClassifier: Metrics with image classification on vs off. Classification adds overhead but improves image metadata.
statsPanel.tooltipP50: Median: half of conversions finished in this time or less.

dropzone.dragAndDropSingle: Drag and drop your document here
dropzone.dragAndDropMultiple: Drag and drop your documents here
dropzone.multipleEnabled: ✨ Multiple file upload enabled - select or drop multiple files
dropzone.enterUrlBodySingle: Paste a direct link to a document (PDF, DOCX, etc.)
dropzone.enterUrlBodyMultiple: Paste one URL per line to convert multiple documents
dropzone.pressEnter: Press Enter to submit or click Convert
dropzone.supportedHint: Supported: PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, HTML, Markdown, Images, and more
dropzone.errorInvalidUrl: Please enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL
dropzone.errorEnterAtLeastOneUrl: Please enter at least one URL

export.noPreview: No preview available for this format
export.jsonPreviewTruncated: Preview truncated ({{count, number}} chars). Use Download to get the full file.
export.noImages: No images extracted from this document
export.noTables: No tables extracted from this document
export.enableChunkingHint: Enable chunking in Settings to generate RAG chunks
